title: piper guineense var. clusii
intro: Piper guineense var. clusii, commonly known as African long pepper or Guinea pepper, is a variety of the West African pepper plant, Piper guineense, which belongs to the pepper family Piperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects, which contribute to its ability to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Piper guineense var. clusii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat different ailments and promote overall well-being.
